translation_findings.issue: stale 甲乙丙丁 and ア-エ markers in translated-stage zh field; output/page_415.{md,json} renders correctly as A./B./C./D.
translation_findings.rationale: Release artifact (output/) is fully normalized. Verified output/page_415.json has A./B./C./D. for every choice.

notes: 5 exam questions (Q11-1..11-5). Answer indices correct (3,2,3,2,2). Technical terms accurate (CPU/main memory/HDD/blade server/cache memory). ZH glossary additions (Quad-Core/Dual-Core/Clock Frequency parentheticals) appropriate. EN fluent.
